derivation_notes.levid_location: VALUE field (8-byte LE uint64) of each index entry
derivation_notes.sort_semantics: MDB_INTEGERKEY uses heed's IntegerComparator (LMDB's built-in integer comparator). Keys sorted by their NUMERIC value (native-endian uint64). NOT a custom golpe comparator — but included in the self-check to verify IntegerComparator registration.
derivation_notes.adversarial_note: No adversarial byte-order inversion needed for IntegerComparator (MDB_INTEGERKEY natively handles byte order). The distinct timestamps across events provide coverage of the index scan.
derivation_notes.tie_resolution: Events with same created_at are stored as duplicate values under the same key (MDB_DUPSORT + MDB_INTEGERDUP). Duplicate values (levIds) sorted numerically ascending.

ordering_groups.note: 4 events; same ts; sorted by levId
